message:
feat: Add runtime debug info reader for Python stack traces

- Create debug_reader.zig for loading .metal0.dbg.json files at runtime
- Add Python line number translation from Zig line numbers
- Add printPythonError() for Python-style error formatting
- Copy debug_reader.zig to cache for all compilation modes
- Export debug_reader module from runtime

This enables Python-friendly stack traces when debug info is available.
